targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        ds.ts_datetime,
        ds.total_items,
        ds.good_read
    FROM dbo.device_statistics ds
    JOIN dbo.devices d
        ON d.id = ds.device_id
    WHERE (
        ${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__'
        OR d.customer = ${tenant:sqlstring}
    )
),
bounds AS (
    SELECT
        CAST(GETDATE() AS date) AS day_start,
        DATEADD(DAY, 1, CAST(GETDATE() AS date)) AS day_end,

        DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1) AS month_start,
        DATEADD(MONTH, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1)) AS month_end,

        DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), 1, 1) AS year_start,
        DATEADD(YEAR, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), 1, 1)) AS year_end
)
SELECT
    -- Year
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.year_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.year_end THEN b.total_items ELSE 0 END), 0)
        AS year_total_parcels,
    CAST(
        COALESCE(
            100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.year_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.year_end THEN b.good_read ELSE 0 END)
            / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.year_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.year_end THEN b.total_items ELSE 0 END), 0),
            0
        ) AS decimal(6,2)
    ) AS year_good_read_pct,

    -- Month
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.month_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.month_end THEN b.total_items ELSE 0 END), 0)
        AS month_total_parcels,
    CAST(
        COALESCE(
            100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.month_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.month_end THEN b.good_read ELSE 0 END)
            / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.month_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.month_end THEN b.total_items ELSE 0 END), 0),
            0
        ) AS decimal(6,2)
    ) AS month_good_read_pct,

    -- Day
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.day_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.day_end THEN b.total_items ELSE 0 END), 0)
        AS day_total_parcels,
    CAST(
        COALESCE(
            100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.day_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.day_end THEN b.good_read ELSE 0 END)
            / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.day_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.day_end THEN b.total_items ELSE 0 END), 0),
            0
        ) AS decimal(6,2)
    ) AS day_good_read_pct
FROM base b
CROSS JOIN bounds bo;

WITH device_scope AS (
  SELECT d.id, d.customer, d.location, d.machine_name
  FROM dbo.devices d
  WHERE (${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__' OR d.customer = ${tenant:sqlstring})
),
latest_status AS (
  SELECT x.device_id, x.status
  FROM (
    SELECT ds.device_id, ds.status,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ds.device_id ORDER BY ds.ts_datetime DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.device_status ds
  ) x
  WHERE x.rn = 1
),
latest_os AS (
  SELECT x.device_id, x.os_version
  FROM (
    SELECT os.device_id, os.os_version,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY os.device_id ORDER BY os.ts_datetime DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.device_os_status os
  ) x
  WHERE x.rn = 1
),
latest_c_drive AS (
  SELECT x.device_id, x.usage_percent
  FROM (
    SELECT ss.device_id, ss.usage_percent,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ss.device_id ORDER BY ss.ts_datetime DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.device_storage_status ss
    WHERE ss.drive = 'C'
  ) x
  WHERE x.rn = 1
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    ds.device_id,
    SUM(ds.total_items)        AS total_items,
    SUM(ds.good_read)          AS good_read,
    SUM(ds.no_dimension)       AS no_dimension,
    SUM(ds.no_weight)          AS no_weight,
    SUM(ds.item_out_of_spec)   AS item_out_of_spec,
    SUM(ds.more_than_1_item)   AS more_than_1_item
  FROM dbo.device_statistics ds
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ds.ts_datetime)
  GROUP BY ds.device_id
)
SELECT
  sc.customer                                AS Customer,
  sc.location                                AS Location,
  sc.machine_name                            AS Name,

  COALESCE(ls.status, 'unknown')             AS [Online Status],

  COALESCE(
  CASE
    -- Windows 11 (builds may appear anywhere in the string)
    WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.26200%' THEN 'Windows 11 25H2'
    WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.26100%' THEN 'Windows 11 24H2'
    WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.22631%' THEN 'Windows 11 23H2'
    WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.22621%' THEN 'Windows 11 22H2'
    WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.22000%' THEN 'Windows 11 21H2'

    -- Windows 10
    WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.19045%' THEN 'Windows 10 22H2'
    WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.19044%' THEN 'Windows 10 21H2'

    -- Null/empty
    WHEN lo.os_version IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(lo.os_version)) = '' THEN NULL

    -- Unknown: if we can find a Windows-style build, show it
    WHEN CHARINDEX('10.0.', lo.os_version) > 0 THEN
      'Unknown (' +
      SUBSTRING(
        lo.os_version,
        CHARINDEX('10.0.', lo.os_version),
        CHARINDEX(' ', lo.os_version + ' ', CHARINDEX('10.0.', lo.os_version)) - CHARINDEX('10.0.', lo.os_version)
      )
      + ')'

    -- Fallback: show first 40 chars so you can see what it is
    ELSE 'Unknown (' + LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(lo.os_version)), 40) + ')'
  END,
  'Unknown'
) AS device_os_version,

  CAST(COALESCE(lc.usage_percent, 0) AS decimal(5,2))  AS [C drive used in %],

  COALESCE(st.total_items, 0)                           AS [Total Items],

  CAST(COALESCE(100.0 * st.good_read        / NULLIF(st.total_items, 0), 0) AS decimal(6,2)) AS [Good Read%],
  CAST(COALESCE(100.0 * st.no_dimension     / NULLIF(st.total_items, 0), 0) AS decimal(6,2)) AS [no_dimensions%],
  CAST(COALESCE(100.0 * st.no_weight        / NULLIF(st.total_items, 0), 0) AS decimal(6,2)) AS [no_weight%],
  CAST(COALESCE(100.0 * st.item_out_of_spec / NULLIF(st.total_items, 0), 0) AS decimal(6,2)) AS [out_of_spec%],
  CAST(COALESCE(100.0 * st.more_than_1_item / NULLIF(st.total_items, 0), 0) AS decimal(6,2)) AS [more_than_one_item%]

FROM device_scope sc
LEFT JOIN latest_status   ls ON ls.device_id = sc.id
LEFT JOIN latest_os       lo ON lo.device_id = sc.id
LEFT JOIN latest_c_drive  lc ON lc.device_id = sc.id
LEFT JOIN stats           st ON st.device_id = sc.id
ORDER BY sc.customer, sc.location, sc.machine_name;

list.definition:
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT 'All' AS __text, '__ALL__' AS __value
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d.customer AS __text,
        d.customer AS __value
    FROM dbo.devices d
) v
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN v.__value = '__ALL__' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    v.__value;
list.description: Select the customer you wish to view.
list.label: Customer
list.name: tenant
list.query:
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT 'All' AS __text, '__ALL__' AS __value
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d.customer AS __text,
        d.customer AS __value
    FROM dbo.devices d
) v
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN v.__value = '__ALL__' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    v.__value;
